name: fnb-caffe-container
description: F&B Caffe Container — Quán cà phê container phong cách F&B hiện đại tại Sa Đéc

scripts.minify:css: cleancss -O2 -o styles.min.css styles.css && cleancss -O2 -o dashboard/dashboard-styles.min.css dashboard/dashboard-styles.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/checkout-styles.min.css css/checkout-styles.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/loyalty-styles.min.css css/loyalty-styles.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/ui-enhancements.min.css css/ui-enhancements.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/about-m3.min.css css/about-m3.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/loyalty-m3.min.css css/loyalty-m3.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/payment-modal.min.css css/payment-modal.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/kds-m3.min.css css/kds-m3.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/kds-styles.min.css css/kds-styles.css && cleancss -O2 -o css/track-order-styles.min.css css/track-order-styles.css
scripts.minify:js: terser script.js -o script.min.js --compress --mangle && terser public/cart.js -o public/cart.min.js --compress --mangle && terser dashboard/dashboard.js -o dashboard/dashboard.min.js --compress --mangle && terser menu.js -o menu.min.js --compress --mangle && terser loyalty.js -o loyalty.min.js --compress --mangle && terser loyalty-ui.js -o loyalty-ui.min.js --compress --mangle && terser kds-app.js -o kds-app.min.js --compress --mangle && terser checkout.js -o checkout.min.js --compress --mangle && terser js/ui-enhancements.js -o js/ui-enhancements.min.js --compress --mangle && terser public/script.js -o public/script.min.js --compress --mangle && terser public/i18n.js -o public/i18n.min.js --compress --mangle && terser js/theme.js -o js/theme.min.js --compress --mangle
scripts.minify: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run minify

author: Mekong CLI
